humanEffortEstimate.rationale: Merged four parallel Sprint 2 sub-branches, resolved three merge conflicts plus post-merge contract issues, reran the full install/typecheck/lint/build/test pipeline, and produced the closeout verification artifact.

frameworkObservations.observation: create-work-item.mjs reported 'Idempotency check failed (proceeding with create): Unexpected end of JSON input' before successfully creating AB#298.
frameworkObservations.suggestion: Harden Azure Boards idempotency response parsing so transient empty-output cases do not produce a misleading failure banner during valid task creation.
